places.name: Adams Hotel
places.shortDescription: Experience legendary Ethiopian hospitality at Adams Hotel, beautifully situated in the heart of Addis Ababa.
places.longDescription: An ideal haven combining authentic local charm with modern comfort. Guests at Adams Hotel enjoy spacious rooms, excellent service, and easy access to Addis Ababa's most iconic historical sites and vibrant local markets. Perfect for both business travelers and adventurous tourists exploring Ethiopia.

places.name: Sheraton Addis, a Luxury Collection Hotel, Addis Ababa
places.shortDescription: Nestled among the National Palace and the Menelik Palace, Sheraton Addis is a sanctuary of refined elegance and African hospitality. The hotel features 10 dining options, an outdoor pool with music, and a world-class spa.

places.name: Hilton Addis Ababa
places.shortDescription: An iconic Addis Ababa landmark inspired by the rock-hewn churches of Lalibela. The hotel is famous for its geothermally heated pool and extensive gardens.
